item.title: Speaker Johnson: Frightening If War Power Limits Approved
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson, R-La., said Monday that Congress passing a war powers resolution to limit President Donald Trump's authority to take furth...

item.title: Holt to Newsmax: GIs Have Performed Almost Perfectly in Iran
item.description: Retired Air Force Brig. Gen. Blaine Holt told Newsmax on Monday that while things have been going extremely well for U.S. forces in Iran so far, servi...

item.title: Pollster to Newsmax: Midterm Impact Depends on Conflict Length
item.description: Polling analyst Patrick Allocco told Newsmax on Monday that despite disparities in early surveys on U.S. airstrikes against Iran, he sees little evide...

item.title: Dems Won't Hold Midterm Convention Amid Fundraising Crunch
item.description: The Democratic National Committee said it will not go forward with a midterm convention as the party continues to lag in fundraising.

item.title: Rep. Fallon to Newsmax: No Rhyme or Reason to Iran's Strategy
item.description: Rep. Pat Fallon, R-Texas, told Newsmax on Monday that Iran is shooting at random since the U.S. and Israel launched airstrikes against the country.
